title: Incoming Asteroid
body: An average-sized asteroid located $$5\times{10}^7$$ km (5.0*10**10 m) from Earth with mass $$2\times{10}^{13}$$ kg is detected headed directly toward Earth with a speed of $$2.0$$ $$\frac{km}{s}$$. You may ignore the size of the asteroid. Take $$G=6.674\times{10}^{-11}$$ $$\frac{N m^2}{{kg}^2}$$, Earth's mass as $$5.97\times{10}^{24}$$ kg, and Earth's radius as $$6.37\times{10}^6$$ $$m$$.
